title: Flexible acoustic waveguide device
abstract: A flexible acoustic waveguide device with a flexible, unitary band comprising a plurality of acoustic waveguides arranged side-by-side along a length of the band.
claims: Claims What is claimed is: 1. A flexible acoustic waveguide device, comprising: a flexible, unitary band comprising a plurality of acoustic waveguides arranged side-by- side along a length of the band. 2. The flexible acoustic waveguide device of claim 1 , wherein the band comprises two acoustic waveguides. 3. The flexible acoustic waveguide device of claim 2, wherein the two acoustic waveguides have essentially the same lengths. 4. The flexible acoustic waveguide device of claim 2, wherein the two acoustic waveguides each have a cross-sectional area, and the two cross-sectional areas are essentially the same. 5. The flexible acoustic waveguide device of claim 4, wherein the band comprises a wall that separate the two acoustic waveguides. 6. The flexible acoustic waveguide device of claim 5, wherein the wall comprises a stiffener. 7. The flexible acoustic waveguide device of claim 6, wherein the stiffener is located along a middle portion of the length of the band. 8. The flexible acoustic waveguide device of claim 2, wherein the two acoustic waveguides are essentially parallel. 9. The flexible acoustic waveguide device of claim 8, further comprising at least one lumen that extends along the length of the band. 10. The flexible acoustic waveguide device of claim 9, further comprising at least one of electrical wiring and a stiffening member in the at least one lumen. 11. The flexible acoustic waveguide device of claim 1, wherein the band comprises two polymeric materials. 12. The flexible acoustic waveguide device of claim 11 , wherein the polymeric materials are both elastomers. 13. The flexible acoustic waveguide device of claim 12, wherein the two elastomers have different hardnesses. 14. The flexible acoustic waveguide device of claim 11, wherein the band comprises alternating segments of the two polymeric materials. 15. The flexible acoustic waveguide device of claim 14, wherein each segment defines portions of each of the acoustic waveguides. 16. The flexible acoustic waveguide device of claim 11, wherein the band comprises an inner portion that defines the acoustic waveguides, and an outer portion that overlies at least some of the inner portion. 17. The flexible acoustic waveguide device of claim 16, wherein the inner portion is made of one polymeric material and the outer portion comprises a spiral band of the other polymeric material. 18. The flexible acoustic waveguide device of claim 1 , wherein the band is made by extrusion. 19. The flexible acoustic waveguide device of claim 1, wherein the band is made by molding. 20. The flexible acoustic waveguide device of claim 19, wherein the band is made by multiple-shot molding. 21. The flexible acoustic waveguide device of claim 4, wherein the wall is stiffened at one or more locations where there is relatively high acoustic coupling between the waveguides.
